title: DecisionMadePayload
description: One deliberation's recorded output — the provenance record for every villager behavior. Producer: agent-service on agent.events.

decision.description: Human-readable statement of what the villager chose to do.

reasoning.description: The LLM's stated rationale — episode gold and debugging gold alike.

error.description: True when the LLM output failed schema validation and the tick fell back to idle (see CIV-7).
